rationale: Twenty-seven exact official MTA rows establish realized QBNR service-change dates and one new current route identity per row. Each row has multiple bounded treatment members and is reviewed as a Queens Bus Network Redesign route-redesign bundle; referenced routes remain treatment text or reviewed rider context only.
